name: Copper CRM
description: Monitor Copper CRM for sales team access and customer relationship data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Copper at https://app.copper.com
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Enter the API key and the email of the user who generated it

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Copper Settings → Integrations → API Keys

credentialFields.label: User Email
credentialFields.helpText: Email address of the Copper user who owns the API key

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Copper CRM users with access to customer relationship data

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Copper CRM platform is operational
